core_skills: React Native, JavaScript, React Native IDEs, React Native tools, React Native UI components
skill_match_scores: React Native:1.0, JavaScript:0.5, React Native IDEs:0.5, React Native tools:1.0, React Native UI components:1.0
must_have_quals: 3+ years of React Native Development, Hands-on code contribution and delivery, Working with the product and design teams to understand end-user requirements and user stories, then translating that into an effective technical approach, Developing and testing your mobile application code, leveraging a sprint based, Agile methodology, Familiarity with APIs and integrate mobile applications with existing backend services, Working closely with QA members on the team to ensure the code you develop meets acceptance criteria, including doing rework where necessary, Coordinate and work closely with other distributed teams across multiple time zones, to execute solutions, Participating in brainstorming sessions and having the chance to contribute innovative and original ideas to our technology and products, Proven track record of designing and developing visually appealing mobile applications for iOS and/or Android devices using React Native, Excellent JavaScript skills with an in-depth knowledge of React Native IDEs, React Native tools, React Native UI components and React Native testing tools
preferred_quals: Knowledge of NextJs, Graphql and Expo is a plus
core_responsibilities: Hands-on code contribution and delivery, Working with the product and design teams to understand end-user requirements and user stories, then translating that into an effective technical approach, Developing and testing your mobile application code, leveraging a sprint based, Agile methodology, Familiarity with APIs and integrate mobile applications with existing backend services, Working closely with QA members on the team to ensure the code you develop meets acceptance criteria, including doing rework where necessary, Coordinate and work closely with other distributed teams across multiple time zones, to execute solutions, Participating in brainstorming sessions and having the chance to contribute innovative and original ideas to our technology and products
job_summary: FreshDirect is a technology-powered grocery company focused on delivering the freshest food directly from farms to homes. They are seeking a Mobile React Native Developer to contribute to the development of mobile applications, working closely with product and design teams to enhance user experience and integrate with backend services.
